description: You are an OHS Specialist conducting a Process Hazard Analysis (PHA) for a methyl acrylate synthesis operation involving Acrylic Acid, Sulfuric Acid, Methanol, Sodium Hydroxide, and Toluene. Using the process description at ~/Desktop/synthesis_process_description.txt and CAMEO Chemicals, evaluate all chemical pairs for reactivity risks, specifically identifying explosion or violent reaction hazards. Identify safety gaps in the described process and document your findings and recommended safeguards in a PHA report at ~/Documents/process_hazard_report.txt.

metadata.critical_pair_2_hazard: Exothermic, generates dimethyl ether at elevated temp
metadata.safety_gap: Building 12 lacks explosion-proof ventilation for flammable vapors
